positive: A stylized, detailed celestial botanical pattern featuring interconnected elements: crescent moons, floating stars, abstract constellations, and elegant, oversized floral vines (like jasmine and monstera leaves). The composition should be highly symmetric, central, and suitable for seamless apparel printing. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Sci-Fi Minimalist. Color Palette: Deep indigo blue, vibrant sapphire blue, gold foil accents, and muted teal/sage green. Lighting: Soft, atmospheric glow emanating from the stars, providing high contrast against the deep background. Ensure clean, crisp lines and strong silhouettes for optimal print fidelity. Vector illustration quality, highly detailed, centered composition.
negative: photorealistic, grainy, blur, watermark, text, logo, signature, low detail, poor anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, dirty, rough edges, noisy, monochrome
